creator: mi@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Dimitry Andric from comment #10)
> There is still some issue with either lld or x265's assembly routines,
> and it fails to link it on i386.

I don't think, I had a problem - neither on 10.x/i386, nor on 11.2/i386. Are you sure, that's not something local to your system?
